content:
COMPLETE THE 16 FAILED FEATURES — DEPLOYMENT ONLY

Repo:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

CURRENT FACTS:
- Production SHA: be86b652
- Latest code is newer than production
- Commit match = NO
- 16/20 features fail because production is stale
- New routes exist locally/GitHub but are not live

MISSION:
Fix the deployment gap and turn the 16 failed features into VERIFIED.

DO NOT write another audit.
DO NOT add new features.
DO NOT use placeholders.
DO NOT mark VERIFIED without live HTTP evidence.

STEP 1 — FORCE PRODUCTION UPDATE

Trigger every available deploy path:

1. GitHub push to main
2. Render auto-deploy
3. Render deploy hook
4. IVX deployment endpoint
5. Deployment brain command
6. runChecks CI sync

Return only:

DEPLOY_PATH:
STATUS:
HTTP_STATUS:
DEPLOY_ID:
ERROR:

STEP 2 — WAIT FOR COMMIT CHANGE

Poll:

GET https://api.ivxholding.com/health
GET https://api.ivxholding.com/version

until production SHA changes from:

be86b652

to latest GitHub SHA.

Return:

GITHUB_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:

STEP 3 — FIX 16 FAILED ROUTES

Retest and fix these production routes:

1. Featured Properties
2. Property Details
3. Member Registration
4. Email Verification
5. SMS Verification
6. Members Dashboard
7. Investor Dashboard
8. CRM
9. JV Deals
10. Property Admin
11. Media Upload
12. Instagram Cards
13. Likes
14. Comments
15. Shares
16. Saves
17. Analytics

For every 404:
- confirm route exists in source
- confirm route registered in hono.ts
- confirm route included in production build
- fix missing registration
- commit
- deploy
- retest

STEP 4 — VERIFY LIVE

Return each feature as:

FEATURE:
URL_OR_API:
HTTP_STATUS:
RAW_RESPONSE:
STATUS:

Allowed statuses:
VERIFIED
FAILED
BLOCKED
UNVERIFIED

STEP 5 — FINAL OUTPUT ONLY

GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
HEALTH_SHA:
VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
FEATURES_VERIFIED:
FEATURES_FAILED:
FEATURES_BLOCKED:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only if:
- production SHA changed from be86b652
- GitHub SHA = health SHA = version SHA
- all failed features return live production evidence
